FAILUsers can be listedConnectAs a Posit Team administratorsrc/vip_tests/connect/test_users.py::test_list_users0.32sTest procedureGiven Connect is accessible at the configured URLWhen I list all usersThen the user list is not emptyAnd the test user exists in the user listError tracebackCopyfixturefunc = <function check_test_user_in_list at 0x7f87e9d7e610>
request = <FixtureRequest for <Function test_list_users>>
kwargs = {'test_username': 'testuser', 'user_list': [{'active_time': '2026-06-09T15:30:48Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-09T15:28:59Z', 'email': '', ...}]}

    def call_fixture_func(
        fixturefunc: _FixtureFunc[FixtureValue], request: FixtureRequest, kwargs
    ) -> FixtureValue:
        if inspect.isgeneratorfunction(fixturefunc):
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., Generator[FixtureValue]], fixturefunc)
            generator = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
            try:
                fixture_result = next(generator)
            except StopIteration:
                raise ValueError(f"{request.fixturename} did not yield a value") from None
            finalizer = functools.partial(_teardown_yield_fixture, fixturefunc, generator)
            request.addfinalizer(finalizer)
        else:
            fixturefunc = cast(Callable[..., FixtureValue], fixturefunc)
>           fixture_result = fixturefunc(**kwargs)
                             ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

.venv/lib/python3.14/site-packages/_pytest/fixtures.py:915: 
_ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ 

user_list = [{'active_time': '2026-06-09T15:30:48Z', 'confirmed': True, 'created_time': '2026-06-09T15:28:59Z', 'email': '', ...}]
test_username = 'testuser'

    @then("the test user exists in the user list")
    def check_test_user_in_list(user_list, test_username):
        expected = test_username.split("@", 1)[0]
        usernames = [u.get("username") for u in user_list]
>       assert expected in usernames, (
            f"Test user {expected!r} (from {test_username!r}) not found in user list: {usernames}"
        )
E       AssertionError: Test user 'testuser' (from 'testuser') not found in user list: ['__bootstrap_admin__']
E       assert 'testuser' in ['__bootstrap_admin__']

2026/06/09 15:32:35.362343318 function (file = if (onefile) "Rplots.pdf" else "Rplot%03d.pdf",
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362351591 width, height, onefile, family, title, fonts, version, paper,
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362380154 encoding, bg, fg, pointsize, pagecentre, colormodel, useDingbats,

2026/06/09 15:32:35.362394475 {

2026/06/09 15:32:35.362410500 new <- list()
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362411271 if (!missing(width))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362425773 new$width <- width
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362426464 if (!missing(height))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362437510 new$height <- height
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362437931 if (!missing(onefile))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362447465 new$onefile <- onefile
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362447896 if (!missing(title))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362462554 new$title <- title
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362466149 if (!missing(fonts))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362491697 new$fonts <- fonts
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362492889 if (!missing(version))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362506590 new$version <- version
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362507311 if (!missing(paper))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362520441 new$paper <- paper
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362521112 if (!missing(encoding))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362534462 new$encoding <- encoding
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362535133 if (!missing(bg))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362548663 new$bg <- bg
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362549314 if (!missing(fg))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362562064 new$fg <- fg
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362562755 if (!missing(pointsize))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362576555 new$pointsize <- pointsize
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362577988 if (!missing(pagecentre))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362592510 new$pagecentre <- pagecentre
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362593241 if (!missing(colormodel))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362607662 new$colormodel <- colormodel
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362608484 if (!missing(useDingbats))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362622385 new$useDingbats <- useDingbats
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362623076 if (!missing(useKerning))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362660647 new$useKerning <- useKerning
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362662299 if (!missing(fillOddEven))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362681318 new$fillOddEven <- fillOddEven
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362681979 if (!missing(compress))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362696932 new$compress <- compress
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362697603 if (!missing(timestamp))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362712215 new$timestamp <- timestamp
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362713046 if (!missing(producer))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362732020 new$producer <- producer
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362800518 if (!missing(author))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362803923 new$author <- author
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362818225 old <- check.options(new, name.opt = ".PDF.Options", envir = .PSenv)
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362818976 if (!missing(family) && (inherits(family, "Type1Font") ||
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362886738 inherits(family, "CIDFont"))) {
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362887549 enc <- family$encoding
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362902331 if (inherits(family, "Type1Font") && !is.null(enc) &&
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362903043 enc != "default" && (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding ==
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362941400 "default"))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362942111 old$encoding <- enc
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362963529 family <- family$metrics
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362965061 }
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362979338 if (is.null(old$encoding) || old$encoding == "default")
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362992423 old$encoding <- guessEncoding()
2026/06/09 15:32:35.362993274 if (!missing(family)) {
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363007956 if (length(family) == 4L) {
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363021056 family <- c(family, "Symbol.afm")
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363035998 }
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363036679 else if (length(family) == 5L) {
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363049769 }
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363050440 else if (length(family) == 1L) {
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363063159 pf <- pdfFonts(family)[[1L]]
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363063911 if (is.null(pf))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363078152 stop(gettextf("unknown family '%s'", family),
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363078943 domain = NA)
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363094356 matchFont(pf, old$encoding)
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363095438 }
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363108388 else stop("invalid 'family' argument")
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363109109 old$family <- family
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363120110 }
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363130271 version <- old$version
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363131132 versions <- c("1.1", "1.2", "1.3", "1.4", "1.5", "1.6", "1.7",
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363146475 "2.0")
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363147417 if (version %in% versions)
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363161117 version <- as.integer(strsplit(version, "[.]")[[1L]])
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363161898 else stop("invalid PDF version")
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363179154 onefile <- old$onefile
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363179855 if (!checkIntFormat(file))
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363199645 stop(gettextf("invalid 'file' argument '%s'", file),
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363200517 domain = NA)
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363215649 .External(C_PDF, file, old$paper, old$family, old$encoding,
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363216260 old$bg, old$fg, old$width, old$height, old$pointsize,
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363232124 onefile, old$pagecentre, old$title, old$fonts, version[1L],
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363232765 version[2L], old$colormodel, old$useDingbats, old$useKerning,
2026/06/09 15:32:35.363249150 old$fillOddEven, old$compress, old$timestamp, old$producer,
